title: BAI President Sarma on Monkeys Watching Games
indian_angle: The President of the Badminton Association of India (BAI), Himanta Biswa Sarma, made a notable comment on local wildlife at Indian tournaments.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma humorously addressed the presence of monkeys at badminton venues, stating there's no problem if they come to watch a game.

title: Indian Shuttlers Urged to Develop Independent Thinking
indian_angle: This article discusses a crucial aspect of player development for Indian shuttlers, encouraging them to be self-reliant on court.
summary: An article suggests Indian shuttlers need to cultivate independent decision-making skills and learn to win matches without constant coaching presence, addressing issues like travel costs.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System Debuts for Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India is implementing a new scoring format for all domestic tournaments, starting in Ernakulam.
summary: A new 3x15 scoring system will be introduced across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, with its debut set for Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Falters in US Open Final
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth, a prominent Indian shuttler, made it to the final of the US Open, a significant achievement for Indian badminton.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, ultimately faltering at the last step against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a Cristiano Ronaldo fan, achieved a major upset by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by defeating the World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.
